channel.title: GitHub Unknown languages Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Unknown languages in GitHub

item.title: slowmist/Blockchain-dark-forest-selfguard-handbook
item.description: Blockchain dark forest selfguard handbook. Master these, master the security of your cryptocurrency.

item.title: n8n-io/self-hosted-ai-starter-kit
item.description: The Self-hosted AI Starter Kit is an open-source template that quickly sets up a local AI environment. Curated by n8n, it provides essential tools for creating secure, self-hosted AI workflows.

item.description: Develop with AI-powered code suggestions using GitHub Copilot and VS Code

item.title: skills/introduction-to-github
item.description: Get started using GitHub in less than an hour.
